name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food – Cocktail 1.5kg
shortDescription: Full-balanced, Beef protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Bonnie Cocktail Adult Cat food , full-balanced, beef protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Beef meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligsacharrides , beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewers yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein …………….. 32% Fat ………………… 12% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) . 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein (Beef), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer’s Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
